Election.title: BV2227 — Favorite Betrayal — honest ballots (STAR & Ranked Robin elect the compromise; RCV-IRV elects a wing)
Election.description: The plain favorite-betrayal question, three ways on the SAME honest ballots. Left/Center/Right, 34 voters; Center is the compromise everyone ranks second and the Condorcet winner, but has the fewest first-choices. STAR (honest 5/3/0 scores) and Ranked Robin elect Center; RCV-IRV squeezes Center out and elects the wing Right. Companion election shows that under RCV-IRV, 2 Left voters ranking Center FIRST (betraying their favorite) flips it to Center — a move STAR and RR never require.

races.title: RCV-IRV — the same honest preferences as ranks
Ranked Robin — the same honest preferences as ranks

logs: Center wins round with highest number of wins.
